title: Aircraft Mechanics and Service Technicians
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul aircraft engines and assemblies, such as hydraulic and pneumatic systems.

tasks.text: Inspect completed work to certify that maintenance meets standards and that aircraft are ready for operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read and interpret maintenance manuals, service bulletins, and other specifications to determine the feasibility and method of repairing or replacing malfunctioning or damaged components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain repair logs, documenting all preventive and corrective aircraft maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine and inspect aircraft components, including landing gear, hydraulic systems, and deicers to locate cracks, breaks, leaks, or other problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct routine and special inspections as required by regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Replace or repair worn, defective, or damaged components, using hand tools, gauges, and testing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect airframes for wear or other defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Check for corrosion, distortion, and invisible cracks in the fuselage, wings, and tail, using x-ray and magnetic inspection equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Measure parts for wear, using precision instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove or install aircraft engines, using hoists or forklift trucks.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Service and maintain aircraft and related apparatus by performing activities such as flushing crankcases, cleaning screens, and or moving parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test operation of engines and other systems, using test equipment, such as ignition analyzers, compression checkers, distributor timers, or ammeters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assemble and install electrical, plumbing, mechanical, hydraulic, and structural components and accessories, using hand or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassemble engines following repair or inspection and reinstall engines in aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Maintain, repair, and rebuild aircraft structures, functional components, and parts, such as wings and fuselage, rigging, hydraulic units, oxygen systems, fuel systems, electrical systems, gaskets, or seals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure the tension of control cables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and interpret pilots' descriptions of problems to diagnose causes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Obtain fuel and oil samples and check them for contamination.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine engines through specially designed openings while working from ladders or scaffolds, or use hoists or lifts to remove the entire engine from an aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Listen to operating engines to detect and diagnose malfunctions, such as sticking or burned valves.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Remove or cut out defective parts or drill holes to gain access to internal defects or damage, using drills and punches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with other workers to coordinate fitting and alignment of heavy parts, or to facilitate processing of repair parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inventory and requisition or order supplies, parts, materials, and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, refuel, and change oil in line service aircraft.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Modify aircraft structures, space vehicles, systems, or components, following drawings, schematics, charts, engineering orders, and technical publications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean engines, sediment bulk and screens, and carburetors, adjusting carburetor float levels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install and align repaired or replacement parts for subsequent riveting or welding, using clamps and wrenches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Accompany aircraft on flights to make in-flight adjustments and corrections.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Locate and mark dimensions and reference lines on defective or replacement parts, using templates, scribes, compasses, and steel rules.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Spread plastic film over areas to be repaired to prevent damage to surrounding areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate defective sections or parts, using metal fabricating machines, saws, brakes, shears, and grinders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, strip, prime, and sand structural surfaces and materials to prepare them for bonding.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Determine repair limits for engine hot section parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble engines and inspect parts, such as turbine blades or cylinders, for corrosion, wear, warping, cracks, and leaks, using precision measuring instruments, x-rays, and magnetic inspection equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Remove, inspect, repair, and install in-flight refueling stores and external fuel tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Trim and shape replacement body sections to specified sizes and fits and secure sections in place, using adhesives, hand tools, and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cure bonded structures, using portable or stationary curing equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and paint aircraft surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
